requirement: UI new work page is submitting and getting a work id back. No new work is starting and 'spine status' doesn't show any new active work.

tasks.description:
{
  "plan_summary": "Identify why UI submission returns work ID but fails to trigger backend work start, then fix the submission-to-execution handoff and status reporting path.

feature_slices.description: Update the UI new-work submission path to always transition persisted work records into QUEUED state and notify the scheduler, matching the lifecycle used by CLI and API entry points.
acceptance: Submitting new work via UI returns an ID and immediately makes the record visible with QUEUED status
Work subsequently appears as active in spine status without additional manual steps

feature_slices.description: Ensure the spine status command and UI work list read from the single source of truth for work state so that newly queued items are reflected in real time.
acceptance: Newly created work from any path (UI/CLI) is queryable by spine status within the same transaction boundary
No orphaned IDs exist that are persisted but invisible to status

feature_slices.description: Add focused end-to-end tests covering the full UI work submission → queued → visible-in-status flow, including failure modes when queuing is skipped.
acceptance: Test suite exercises UI submission, status transition, and spine status query in one run
Tests catch both successful enqueuing and the prior bug of missing QUEUED transition

task_outputs:
{
  "plan_summary": "Identify why UI submission returns work ID but fails to trigger backend work start, then fix the submission-to-execution handoff and status reporting path.",
  "architecture": {
    "components": [
      {
        "name": "NewWorkForm",
        "purpose": "Handles UI submission of new work and receives work ID",
        "files": ["src/ui/pages/NewWork.tsx", "src/ui/api/workApi.ts"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkService"]
      },
      {
        "name": "WorkService",
        "purpose": "Creates work record and should trigger execution engine",
        "files": ["src/core/services/WorkService.ts", "src/core/execution/ExecutionEngine.ts"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkRepository", "ExecutionEngine"]
      },
      {
        "name": "StatusReporter",
        "purpose": "Reports active work via 'spine status' command",
        "files": ["src/cli/commands/status.ts", "src/core/services/StatusService.ts"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkRepository"]
      }
    ],
    "data_flow": "UI POST /work -> WorkService.create() saves record + returns ID; create() must also call ExecutionEngine.start(workId); 'spine status' queries WorkRepository for active items.",
    "interfaces": [
      {
        "name": "IWorkService",
        "methods": ["createWork", "getWork", "listActive"],
        "purpose": "Contract between UI/cli and execution layer"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "TASK-001",
      "title": "Explore codebase to locate new-work submission path",
      "description": "Identify files handling UI new work creation, work ID generation, and the call to start execution.",
      "type": "document",
      "files": ["src/ui/pages/NewWork.tsx", "src/core/services/WorkService.ts"],
      "dependencies": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Found the POST handler and service method that returns work ID"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "No code changes; delete exploration notes if needed"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-002",
      "title": "Identify missing execution trigger in WorkService.create",
      "description": "Determine why creating a work record does not invoke ExecutionEngine.start() or equivalent.",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/core/services/WorkService.ts"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-001"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Code path shows create() returns ID without calling start()"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Revert any comments added"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-003",
      "title": "Add execution start call after work record creation",
      "description": "Modify WorkService.create() to call ExecutionEngine.start(workId) after successful persistence.",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/core/services/WorkService.ts"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-002"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["New work ID now triggers background execution"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "rollback": "Remove the start() call and restore previous return logic"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-004",
      "title": "Ensure 'spine status' reflects newly started work",
      "description": "Verify StatusService and CLI use WorkRepository to list items whose state is active/started.",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/cli/commands/status.ts", "src/core/services/StatusService.ts"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-003"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Newly created work appears in status output"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Revert status query changes"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-005",
      "title": "Add unit tests for work creation + execution trigger",
      "description": "Write tests that assert create() returns ID and calls ExecutionEngine.start().",
      "type": "test",
      "files": ["tests/services/WorkService.test.ts"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-003"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Tests pass and cover happy path and error case"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Delete the new test file"
    }
  ],
  "testing_strategy": {
    "unit_tests": ["WorkService.create should call ExecutionEngine.start", "StatusService.listActive returns newly created work"],
    "integration_tests": ["UI submission end-to-end returns ID and status shows work"],
    "manual_tests": ["Run UI, submit new work, run 'spine status'"],
    "test_order": ["TASK-005", "TASK-004"]
  },
  "checkpoints": [
    {
      "after_task": "TASK-003",
      "verify": ["Manual: submit work, observe execution log or state change"],
      "rollback_to": "TASK-002"
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": [
    "ExecutionEngine.start() exists and is the correct entry point",
    "WorkRepository already persists work state correctly"
  ],
  "blocked_by": []
}

{
  "plan_summary": "Investigate work submission flow from UI to backend, identify where work ID is returned but work never starts, then add missing worker/process startup logic and status integration.",
  "architecture": {
    "components": [
      {
        "name": "WorkSubmissionUI",
        "purpose": "Collects new work parameters and submits to backend via API, receives work ID",
        "files": ["src/ui/work_page.py", "src/api/work_routes.py"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkManager", "WorkQueue"]
      },
      {
        "name": "WorkManager",
        "purpose": "Handles work lifecycle including starting new work items and tracking status",
        "files": ["src/core/work_manager.py", "src/core/status.py"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkerProcess", "Database"]
      },
      {
        "name": "WorkerProcess",
        "purpose": "Executes actual work in separate process",
        "files": ["src/workers/worker.py"],
        "dependencies": ["WorkManager"]
      }
    ],
    "data_flow": "UI -> WorkSubmissionAPI -> WorkManager.create_work() returns ID but does not trigger start(); WorkManager must queue work to WorkerProcess which updates status for 'spine status' command",
    "interfaces": [
      {
        "name": "IWorkManager",
        "methods": ["create_work", "start_work", "get_status"],
        "purpose": "Contract for work lifecycle operations"
      }
    ]
  },
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "TASK-001",
      "title": "Explore existing work submission and status code",
      "description": "Use filesystem tools to locate UI submission code, work creation logic, and status command implementation",
      "type": "document",
      "files": ["src/ui/work_page.py", "src/core/work_manager.py", "src/cli/status.py"],
      "dependencies": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Key files and call sites identified", "Work creation vs start flow documented"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "N/A - read-only investigation"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-002",
      "title": "Add start_work invocation after work creation",
      "description": "Modify work creation endpoint or manager to call start_work() immediately after generating work ID",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/core/work_manager.py", "src/api/work_routes.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-001"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["New work is actually started when submitted from UI", "Work ID returned remains unchanged"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "medium",
      "rollback": "Revert changes in work_manager.py and work_routes.py"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-003",
      "title": "Integrate worker startup logic",
      "description": "Ensure WorkerProcess is spawned and attached to new work item so execution begins",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/core/work_manager.py", "src/workers/worker.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-002"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Worker process appears in process list", "Work transitions to 'running' state"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "high",
      "rollback": "Revert worker spawn logic and restore previous manager state"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-004",
      "title": "Fix status command to show active work",
      "description": "Update spine status CLI to query active/running work items from WorkManager",
      "type": "modify",
      "files": ["src/cli/status.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-003"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["Newly started work appears in 'spine status' output"],
      "estimated_complexity": "low",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Revert status.py changes"
    },
    {
      "id": "TASK-005",
      "title": "Add tests for work submission and status",
      "description": "Write unit tests verifying create+start flow and integration test for status display",
      "type": "test",
      "files": ["tests/test_work_manager.py", "tests/test_status_cli.py"],
      "dependencies": ["TASK-004"],
      "acceptance_criteria": ["All new tests pass", "Existing tests still pass"],
      "estimated_complexity": "medium",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "rollback": "Delete new test files"
    }
  ],
  "testing_strategy": {
    "unit_tests": ["WorkManager.create_work + start_work behavior", "WorkerProcess attachment", "Status command output parsing"],
    "integration_tests": ["End-to-end UI submit → worker start → status visible"],
    "manual_tests": ["Run UI, submit new work, verify 'spine status' shows active work"],
    "test_order": ["TASK-005 unit tests", "TASK-005 integration tests", "manual verification"]
  },
  "checkpoints": [
    {
      "after_task": "TASK-003",
      "verify": ["Work is now running after submission", "No zombie processes left"],
      "rollback_to": "TASK-001"
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": [
    "Work creation intentionally decoupled from start",
    "Worker process management exists but not wired to UI flow"
  ],
  "blocked_by": []
}
